Cellular Adaptation Protocols

Our methodology is rooted in empirical physiological threshold expansion. By manipulating environmental atmospheric pressure and synthetic gas mixtures, we stimulate significant red blood cell production and optimise EPO responses.

Continuous biometric sleep-optimisation diagnostics ensure that adaptation occurs predictably, rigorously mitigating risks associated with high-pressure variables.

+14% Erythropoietin (EPO)
Δ VO2 Maximal Efficiency
